# testdata/lens/sample_profiles

Real Gyroflow lens profiles, copied **verbatim, unmodified** from
[github.com/gyroflow/lens_profiles](https://github.com/gyroflow/lens_profiles)
@ branch `main`, retrieved 2026-05-17.

| Committed file | Upstream raw URL | Size (bytes) | SHA-256 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GoPro_HERO11_Black_Linear_16by9.json` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gyroflow/lens_profiles/main/GoPro/GoPro_HERO11%20Black_Linear_16by9.json | 25552 | `4539e14c76ca8898b508bddefc473ec96cb69a948cc619cab725ea403087bbf8` |
| `Sony_A1_Sigma_14-24mm_1080p.json` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gyroflow/lens_profiles/main/Sony/Sony_A1_Sigma%2014-24mm__1080p_16by9_1920x1080-23.98fps.json | 1459 | `2e20259b9f5362431991a6dbe49370206b3d57b5e55893036364be81fb00e011` |
| `DJI_AIR_2S_4k_29.97fps.json` | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gyroflow/lens_profiles/main/DJI/DJI_AIR%202S___4k_16by9_3840x2160-29.97fps.json | 1394 | `a085b71ebd5d845e61f5fa4f3ff00bd466a443df3291c0ac15ba695407b9d849` |

Local filenames are sanitized (upstream names contain spaces); file **contents
are the exact upstream bytes** (verified byte-identical via sha256/cmp).
